wikitext.*:
=====[[Pokémon World Tournament]]=====
Fantina uses three of these Pokémon in [[Pokémon battle|Single Battles]], four in [[Double Battle|Double]] and [[Rotation Battle]]s, and all six in [[Triple Battle]]s. She will always lead with her signature Pokémon, {{p|Mismagius}}.
